title: DID Gripped Stubby Phillips & Slotted Screwdriver Set 2PC
description: The DID Stubby Screwdriver Set includes a Phillips and Slotted screwdriver for home DIY. Noted for their ability to tighten and loosen screws in small spaces, Stubby Screwdrivers have non-slip rubber handles for supreme comfort and control. Sturdy and durable, the DID Screwdriver is ideal for construction, electrical and automotive tasks.
